description: Evaluates credential management service maturity—lifecycle policies, secure credential vaults, provisioning and deprovisioning, passkey and secrets governance, non-human credential lifecycle, KPIs/KRIs, and credential custodianship with separation of duties.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A credential management service exists and is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise credential management service exists
Regular service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Credential management KPIs and KRIs—including rotation compliance, secrets sprawl, and passkey adoption—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs
Regular KPI/KRI review
Credential rotation and expiry compliance metrics
Secrets and API key sprawl metrics
Passkey and passwordless credential adoption metrics

capabilities.name: Credential lifecycle policy
capabilities.description: Password, passkey, certificate age, and credential storage policies are documented, scoped appropriately, and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented password and passkey policy for applications, networks, and endpoints
Formalized certificate age policy
Documented credential storage policy
Enterprise-wide vs vertical password policy scope
Regular password and credential policy review

capabilities.name: Secure credential vault and identity store
capabilities.description: The identity store or enterprise secrets vault securely manages credentials with automatic provisioning and deprovisioning and regular configuration review.
evaluation_focus: Identity store or vault manages and stores credentials securely
Automatic credential provisioning and deprovisioning
Credential vault configuration review
Integration with identity management and authentication systems

capabilities.name: Credential lifecycle operations
capabilities.description: Credential provisioning, deprovisioning, and secure storage are formalized, scoped appropriately, automated, and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized credential provisioning process
Formalized credential deprovisioning process
Formalized credential storage process
Enterprise-wide vs vertical lifecycle scope
Automated credential creation, rotation, and revocation
Regular credential lifecycle process review

capabilities.name: Non-human and API credential governance
capabilities.description: Service account passwords, API keys, OAuth client secrets, and workload credentials are governed with rotation, vault storage, and prohibition of shared human passwords.
evaluation_focus: Governed service account and API credential lifecycle
Secrets vault storage for non-human credentials
Prohibition of shared credentials for workloads and automation
Automated rotation of API keys and client secrets

capabilities.name: Credential custodian
capabilities.description: A dedicated credential custodian manages credentials with separation of duties between user creation, authentication, and credential creation.
evaluation_focus: Dedicated credential management custodian
Separation of duties for user, authentication, and credential roles

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
